message:
fix(cli): exact filename match in SHA256SUMS parsing, clean stale port env vars

- SHA256SUMS checksum lookup now uses exact filename comparison
  instead of substring contains(), preventing false matches on
  .sig/.asc sidecar files that share the artifact name as prefix.

- config set-port now strips stale AGENT_MAIL_HTTP_PORT and
  AM_HTTP_PORT entries from env files, not just overwrites
  HTTP_PORT — avoids leaving dead config that confuses users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
